title: ModelWorkPacket
description: Schema for a ModelWorkPacket — a local contract for routing work to a model worker. Candidate only, no live inference.

binding_ref.description: Reference to the binding contract governing this packet

work_id.description: Reference to the universal work unit this packet serves

slot_contract_ref.description: Reference to the slot contract defining input/output slots

context_capsule_ref.description: Reference to the context capsule for this work unit

gaptext_ref.description: Reference to the gaptext instructions for slot filling

model_route_ref.description: Route class identifier from the model scale ladder

provider_policy_ref.description: Reference to the provider seam / policy governing execution

task.description: Human-readable description of the task to be performed

input_refs.description: References to input artifacts for this work packet

output_contract_ref.description: Reference to the output contract defining expected output shape

facts.description: Known facts about the task context

forbidden_outputs.description: Output types that are forbidden for this packet

return_contract.description: Contract defining the shape and claim boundary of the returned candidate

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary for this packet — what this packet does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — packet output is candidate only, never applied directly

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this packet does not claim or prove
